_about: SYNTHETIC PP&E GL with a KNOWN roll-forward answer (NOT real data). Three classes: Land (cost only — the no-depreciation exemption), Buildings and Plant (cost + accumulated depreciation). Each schedule ties (opening + movements = closing). Total NBV 6650 == the master concept's value, so the master-FS note attaches and reconciles. Used to prove the note-attachment seam: reconcile-to-concept-or-BLOCK + the explicit sign assertion. Real-Mobily-Note-7 verification is the named pending gate.
